name: zinput_poll_active_devices
description: zInput::PollActiveDevices dispatches mouse, joystick, and keyboard polling only when the corresponding active flags and poll reference counts are enabled.
known_limits: No dedicated VC COFF byte target exists yet for this zInput dispatcher; the smoke covers enabled device dispatch and the existing device-specific smokes cover each callee path.
Source dependencies are accepted as limited because lower mouse, joystick, and keyboard polling leaves still need a coherent zInput binary-safe class pass.
